full_text:
Zhou Yu (Renming) 周㬂 (仁明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Yu (周㬂), styledRenming (仁明), was born in Kuaiji. Helped his brother against Sun Jian and Yuan Shu, he was later killed by Xu Gong. Zhou Yu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
